arts.ttl: Bielik in midfield: Birmingham City team news and predicted XI to face Cambridge United
arts.sum: The latest Birmingham City team news as Chris Davies' side gear up to face Cambridge United in the League One. The post Bielik in midfield: Birmingham City team news and predicted XI to face Cambridge United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City could be without five players against Cambridge as key injuries bite
arts.sum: Blues lost Marc Leonard to injury during the match and Davies revealed afterwards that Taylor Gardner-Hickman faces a stint out of the team too. Chris Davies might have to patch up his midfield to face Cambridge United with Tomoki Iwata the last man standing after Birmingham City's FA Cup defeat to Newcastle.

arts.ttl: How the national media reported Birmingham City's remarkable FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Birmingham City may have crashed out of this year’s FA Cup at the hands of Premier League Newcastle United but there was only one winner in the eyes of the national media after a “remarkable” tie at St Andrew’s. Joe Willock’s double settled this fourth-round FA Cup belter, while Brum’s Tomoki Iwata had to settle for scoring arguably the goal of the season.
